examples.title: Monte Carlo Primality Test
examples.description: Probabilistic prime checking with k iterations
examples.code:
FUNCTION isPrime(n, k):
  FOR i FROM 1 TO k:
    a = random(2, n-2)
    IF a^(n-1) mod n ≠ 1:
      RETURN Composite
  RETURN Probably Prime
examples.explanation: Fermat primality test with adjustable accuracy
